### Check 3: Financial / concurrency

```
━━ Financial math, concurrency, and soft-delete check (rules #3, #19, #20, #21) ━━

  Scanned 1630 files.

  ✅ Rule #19 — read+write needs runTransaction — clean
```

### Check 4: Structural consistency
